exceptions.expectedDifference: Rejected DB candidate score differs when subpixel minAreaRect output crosses the official int32 fillPoly mask boundary.
exceptions.requiredInvariant: decision is exactly below_box_threshold in native and oracle
exceptions.rootCause: The native and Python OpenCV builds differ by about 0.00006 pixels at one rectangle corner; truncation changes one mask column.
exceptions.expiresWith: bundle, OpenCV, compiler, or DB postprocess update

exceptions.expectedDifference: Bounded-profile rejected DB candidate score differs when subpixel minAreaRect output crosses the official int32 fillPoly mask boundary.
exceptions.requiredInvariant: decision is exactly below_box_threshold in native and oracle
exceptions.rootCause: The native and Python OpenCV builds differ by about 0.00006 pixels at one rectangle corner; truncation changes one mask column.
exceptions.expiresWith: bundle, profile, OpenCV, compiler, or DB postprocess update
